title: France LPM master compliance dashboard + Direction Générale + Délégué OIV attestation roll-up
evidence: Saved search `UC-22.58.8` archived daily to `audit_evidence` with `lpm_clause="LPM-master-rollup"`. Every row pins (uc, evidence_rows, last_evidence, hours_since_evidence, health).

compliance.assurance_rationale: Roll-up across all 22.58.x UCs; provides the single Direction Générale-facing scorecard.
compliance.controlObjective: Provides a single attestation scorecard for the Délégué OIV and Direction Générale.
compliance.evidenceArtifact: Saved search archived to `audit_evidence`, the `LPM Master Scorecard` dashboard, signed monthly attestation by the Délégué OIV.

controlTest.positiveScenario: Force any UC-22.58.x to stop firing for 48 hours. UC-22.58.8 MUST flag staleness within 24h.
controlTest.negativeScenario: All UC-22.58.x evidence current. UC-22.58.8 MUST roll up green.

spl:
search index=audit_evidence reg=FR-LPM earliest=-30d@d
| eval uc = case(
    match(_raw, "uc=22\.58\."), "22.58." + replace(_raw, ".*uc=22\.58\.(\d+).*", "\1"),
    1=1, "unknown")
| stats count as evidence_rows latest(_time) as last_evidence by uc
| eval hours_since_evidence = round((now() - last_evidence) / 3600, 1)
| eval health = case(
    hours_since_evidence > 48, "stale",
    evidence_rows = 0, "missing",
    1=1, "current")
| sort uc
| table uc evidence_rows last_evidence hours_since_evidence health
description: Daily roll-up showing UC-22.58.x evidence health.
value: Direction Générale + Délégué OIV-facing scorecard; defensible in ANSSI/PASSI inspections.
implementation: (1) Schedule UC-22.58.8 daily. (2) Build the `LPM Master Scorecard` dashboard. (3) Sign-off monthly by Délégué OIV.
visualization: (Panel 1) Per-UC health. (Panel 2) Trend (12-month). (Panel 3) Top outstanding. (Panel 4) Délégué OIV monthly attestation history.

references.title: Code de la défense (Partie réglementaire) — OIV

knownFalsePositives:
1. **UC cadence drift**: tune per UC cadence (some run every 4h, some daily).

**Suppression mechanism**: KV Store `lpm_22_58_8_exceptions` with documented Délégué OIV approval.
reviewer: LPM Compliance SME Panel + Délégué OIV + RSSI + Direction Générale
detailedImplementation:
## Prerequisites

All UC-22.58.1 through UC-22.58.7 running.

## Step 1 — Schedule

```ini
[UC-22.58.8: LPM Master Roll-Up]
cron_schedule = 31 16 * * *
actions = summary_index, notable
action.summary_index._name = audit_evidence
action.summary_index.marker = uc=22.58.8,reg=FR-LPM,clause=LPM-master-rollup
alert.severity = 4
```

## Step 2 — Runbook

Monthly Délégué OIV review and Direction Générale sign-off.

**FR-specific failure modes**:
- **Délégué OIV personal liability**: emphasize defensibility; every UC must stand alone for ANSSI/PASSI inspection.
- **Inter-secteur correlation**: a multi-secteur OIV may have several sub-rollups; aggregate carefully.
grandmaExplanation: Tous les contrôles LPM se concentrent dans un tableau de bord unique pour le Délégué OIV et la Direction Générale, avec attestation mensuelle.
